red apple tree in a park. Low branches with easy access from ground. fruit picker needed for higher branches. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
1606 Winton Rd N, Rochester, NY 14609, USA
9 crab apple trees in public park. can reach from the ground or use a ladder to get the middle/high branches. Abundant fruit. Access: Public.

several apple trees, some green, some red. Two mature dwarves just to the south of the parking lot, behind the port o potty. Some smaller, immature apples along roadside and parking lot. Access: Public.

A large green apple tree, between the Chinese restaurant the road, and a red apple tree, between the peppered pig and royal dynasty. Easily harvested from the ground, or higher branches with fruit picker. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
A cluster of hazelnut trees Access: Public.

Really nice pear tree at the elementary school. Principle says they don't use the fruit so they are fair game. Will need a stepstool/ladder and fruit grabber for the tall branches. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Small patch off the blue trail in lucien Morrin Park. there are several along this trail
